title: Uniswap Jumps Double Digits as Standard Chartered Eyes $100 UNI by 2030
message_html: Uniswap Jumps Double Digits as Standard Chartered Eyes $100 UNI by 2030 ...
snippet: The DeFi token is up 20% in a day, with a Standard Chartered note and Uniswap's tokenized-stock launch fueling fresh demand.

title: British Neobank Plasma Debuts Stablecoin Banking Product
message_html: British Neobank Plasma Debuts Stablecoin Banking Product ...
snippet: U.K. neobank Plasma has launched what it calls its flagship stablecoin banking product. Plasma One, announced Monday (June 14), is part of what the company says is its bet that the next iteration of consumer banking will be built on stablecoin rails. “For years, stablecoin adoption has been held bac

title: China pays closer attention to stablecoins as cross-border role expands
message_html: China pays closer attention to stablecoins as cross-border role expands ...
snippet: A senior PBOC official called for closer monitoring, stronger regulation and international coordination as stablecoins gain importance in global payments.
